snapshot.title: Design and sketch the arc-complete celebration moment
snapshot.description: Sketch the layout and write the UX spec for the arc-complete screen. Headline, supporting line, timing, visual sequence. Restrained puzzle-console aesthetic, not a full cutscene. Merges 8rv9kf + tohsuq (pr392y). Kanban: er5qm8
